zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin I de Renty於1280年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪時，他的父親Jacques I de Renty30歲，母親Jeanne de Seninghem25歲。他於1299年與Gertrude de Falvy在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆法爾維結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin I de Renty于1280年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪时，他的父亲Jacques I de Renty30岁，母亲Jeanne de Seninghem25岁。他于1299年与Gertrude de Falvy在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆法爾維结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Renty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Renz   and, in North America, its altered form.

variants.name: Renslow
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German Renzle, from a pet form of Rentz .

variants.name: Rentzel
meanings: habitational name from Renzel in Hanover.
from a pet form of the personal name   Rentz  .

variants.name: Renze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Josefina, Mercedes.
North German: archaic form of Rentz 1 (from Lorenz).

variants.name: Renz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Horst, Fritz, Hans, Kurt.
German: from the personal name Renz, a short form of Reinhard (see Reinhardt ) or Lorenz (see Lawrence ).
German: habitational name from any of several places called Renz or Rentz in Pomerania and the former East Prussia.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin I de Renty was born in 1280, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jacques I de Renty, was 30 and his mother, Jeanne de Seninghem, was 25. He married Gertrude de Falvy in 1299, in Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1333.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin I de Renty est né en 1280, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jacques I de Renty, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Seninghem, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude de Falvy en 1299, à Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1333.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin I de Renty 1280 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacques I de Renty 30 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Seninghem 25. Er hat 1299 in Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Gertrude de Falvy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1333.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin I de Renty è nato il nel 1280 nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jacques I de Renty, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Seninghem, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude de Falvy nel 1299, nel Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1333.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin I de Rentyが1280年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイで生まれた時，父Jacques I de Rentyは30歳，母Jeanne de Seninghemは25歳であった。1299年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメファルビーでGertrude de Falvyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin I de Renty(이)가 1280년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacques I de Renty(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Seninghem(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1299년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 팔비에서 Gertrude de Falvy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin I de Renty nasceu em 1280, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jacques I de Renty, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Seninghem, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrude de Falvy em 1299, em Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1333.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin I de Renty родился в 1280 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jacques I de Renty было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Seninghem, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude de Falvy в 1299 г. в местности фалви, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1333 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin I de Renty nació en 1280, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jacques I de Renty, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Seninghem, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gertrude de Falvy en 1299, en Falvy, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1333.
